section_miscategorizations.text: Rescribe ice packs for pain and swelling.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The intent (recommending ice as a treatment) is appropriate for the Plan section, but the wording 'Rescribe' is confusing and could be misread as documenting an existing treatment rather than a new/continued recommendation. Content-wise it belongs in P, so this is only a minor organizational/wording issue, not a true section misplacement.
